acceptance.criterion: On Python 3.9, `python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -t .` reports 0 failures and 0 errors, with the sync/bundle modules skipped via an explicit version gate whose message names the 3.10 floor.
acceptance.evidence: Full 3.9 suite: Ran 1158 tests, 0 failures, 0 errors, 38 skips (exit 0); skip messages and script SystemExit name the 3.10 floor.

acceptance.criterion: A worker stdout line `{"type": "log", "session_id": "<foreign-uuid>"}` no longer binds or mismatches session identity on any host; a new regression test proves it, and the codex `thread.started` and claude caller-preset paths still bind correctly.
acceptance.evidence: tests/test_native_worker_hardening.py ProviderIdentityEventTypingTests (10 tests): log-typed foreign session_id neither binds nor mismatches in-phase; codex thread.started and claude preset+system/init still bind.

acceptance.criterion: A failing execution phase whose stdout contains the word "timeout" is classified terminal (not transient); a stderr/provider-error transport failure is still classified transient; both proven by new tests.
acceptance.evidence: TransientFailureScopingTests (4 tests): stdout "timeout" narration terminal; stderr markers and provider error events transient.

acceptance.criterion: A session id literally spelled `continue` (and `most-recent`/`most_recent`) is rejected by the shared validator everywhere it is used, proven by tests exercising the shared set from at least two call sites.
acceptance.evidence: schema.AMBIGUOUS_SESSION_TOKENS consumed by native_worker/implement/adapters/full_run/openrouter_lens; SharedAmbiguousSessionTokenTests exercise 3 call sites; review-fix extended unification to full_run and openrouter_lens.

acceptance.criterion: New tests prove a hung-git `TimeoutExpired` produces a terminal failed state (not a raw traceback), a torn follow-log line is skipped by the follower, and `stderr_tail` survives when provider events exist.
acceptance.evidence: SupervisorRobustnessTests (4 tests): hung-git TimeoutExpired -> terminal failed state (native_worker_git_timeout), torn follow-log lines skipped with seek-back, stderr_tail survives provider events.

acceptance.criterion: A test asserts every failure reason the supervisor can emit is a member of `PREWALK_FAILURE_CODES`, and the guide-recovery misclassification case now reports `prewalk_post_edit_cold_fallback_forbidden`.
acceptance.evidence: PrewalkFailureCodeInventoryTests: source-scraped emitted codes (6 emission shapes) subset of PREWALK_FAILURE_CODES; guide-recovery moved-HEAD+retained-edit case asserts prewalk_post_edit_cold_fallback_forbidden.

acceptance.criterion: A host-profile registry exists and is consumed by spec construction, child-env secrets, identity readiness, probe argv, and transport naming; the codex/claude `if/elif` chains at the audited sites are gone, and all pre-existing native-worker/prewalk/routing tests pass unchanged.
acceptance.evidence: host_profiles.py registry consumed by spec construction, child-env secrets, identity readiness, probe argv, transport naming; if/elif chains removed (grep-verified); byte-identity proven by NativeArgvByteIdentityTests written pre-refactor plus an independent 32-case differential harness (review F1); full suite 1180/0/0/38.

acceptance.criterion: `native-worker spec --host grok` emits the exact create/resume argv above (proven by test), with `--permission-mode auto`, without any yolo/always-approve/dontAsk token, and with the caller-generated UUID recorded before launch.
acceptance.evidence: test_host_profiles.py unit + CLI subprocess tests pin exact grok create/resume argv with --permission-mode auto, no yolo/always-approve/dontAsk token, caller UUID on the spec; launch --host grok fails closed (grok_native_worker_launch_unqualified) at CLI and launch_native_worker (registry launch_ready gate).

acceptance.criterion: With no qualification artifact, `route-worker` with provider grok and prewalk auto/required reports actual mode `off`/fails before launch respectively, with the new concrete fallback reason; `allow_grok=false` still vetoes regardless of evidence, proven by tests.
acceptance.evidence: GrokPrewalkQualificationGateTests (8 tests): auto reports concrete unqualified fallback with grok-scoped capability payload; required fails before launch; allow_grok=false vetoes before evidence; fixture-sourced evidence forbidden; positive path only via matching retained_safe grok-bound evidence (B3 seam).

acceptance.criterion: The grok child environment passes through only the documented auth names via the registry allowlist, proven by a test that asserts `XAI_API_KEY` survives and arbitrary secrets are stripped.
acceptance.evidence: Child-env test: XAI_API_KEY survives for grok, GROK_AUTH_PATH stripped (isolation control; provider_auth-validated projection only), arbitrary secrets stripped, native hosts never receive grok auth.

acceptance.criterion: Public API snapshot gate passes with additions only; no existing exported name changes.
acceptance.evidence: public_api_snapshot compatibility gate ok=true breaking=[]; suite green; profile-view changes key-additive.

batches.name: Host profile registry and feature-gated Grok prewalk arm

acceptance.criterion: `prewalk-capabilities --host grok` returns fixture-backed advertised grammar with zero model calls; absent an installed grok binary it reports a concrete unavailable reason instead of erroring.
acceptance.evidence: GrokPrewalkStaticProbeTests: fixture-backed advertised grammar (exact resume + route override) from grok-0.2.102-help.txt; every probe subprocess argv is --version/--help (zero model calls, test-asserted); missing binary -> installed_binary_missing with concrete unavailable_reason, CLI end-to-end without traceback.

acceptance.criterion: The artifact loader accepts a golden valid grok qualification artifact and rejects each single-field mutation (wrong host, wrong version, wrong session, missing route, fidelity `pruned`, oversized, symlink) with a stable diagnostic, all proven by tests.
acceptance.evidence: GrokPrewalkQualificationLoaderTests: golden retained_safe artifact accepted with evidence_source = resolved artifact path; 29 single-field mutations + symlink/group-writable/oversized/absent all rejected with stable codes before any field trusted; probe binds artifact to installed version AND build commit (mismatch tests); fd-bound O_NOFOLLOW read (review hardening).

acceptance.criterion: With a golden `retained_safe` artifact present, `route-worker` provider grok + prewalk required passes the gate in a fixture environment; with `pruned` it fails before launch; both proven by tests without any live grok invocation.
acceptance.evidence: GrokPrewalkQualificationArtifactGateTests: retained_safe artifact passes required gate in fixture env (actual_mode exact_session, transport grok_build); pruned fails before launch (required) and reports honest fallback (auto); --grok-prewalk-qualification CLI proven end-to-end by subprocess; no live grok invocation anywhere.

acceptance.criterion: `python3 scripts/check_repo_consistency.py` passes with the amended contracts and updated pins; no forbidden-phrase guard regressions.
acceptance.evidence: check_repo_consistency.py exit 0 with amended contracts; consistency_policy.py diff strictly additive (15 pins, 0 deletions, no label/forbidden-guard changes); linter tests 80/80 OK.

acceptance.criterion: Every glossary term listed above resolves (new entries present, dead entry removed), and `prewalk.md`/`host-parity.md`/`adaptive-worker-routing.md` carry the Grok amendments with no sentence claiming Grok prewalk is available or qualified.
acceptance.evidence: All 12 glossary terms present, dead Handling-matrix entry removed with zero orphan references; prewalk.md/host-parity.md/adaptive-worker-routing.md carry the Grok amendments; reviewer cardinal-rule verdict CLEAN (no sentence claims availability or qualification); every technical claim verified against B1-B3 code.

acceptance.criterion: The five doc-hygiene items are fixed and `CHANGELOG.md` `[Unreleased]` describes all four batches accurately.
acceptance.evidence: All five hygiene items verified done (dead link, opencode-cli map, grok-4.5 reconciliation, version markers, TODO restructure with two accurate scout items); CHANGELOG [Unreleased] maps 1:1 to commits d785112/912dacf/9dbe649/92e69ca; review W1 (new repo-only citation) fixed with the hedge formula.
